title: potentilla verna subsp. arenaria
intro: Potentilla verna subsp. arenaria, also known as the Northern or Arctic cinquefoil, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The health benefits of Potentilla verna subsp. arenaria include its ability to support the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
